text: Being in this space awakens a sense of curiosity within me. The environment feels modern and thoughtfully designed, full of glass, light, and interruptions of blue. The transition to the R+D display fills me with anticipation: words and ideas about innovation and coexistence with machines invite me to ponder my place in a world shaped by rapid technological evolution. I am both a witness and a participant in this unfolding story of human ingenuity.
